Reviews on Google The doctors at Firewheel Dental Implants and Periodontics enjoy more than 300 5-star reviews on Google and Facebook – more than most other practices that focus on implants in the Dallas area. Read Google Reviews › Why Choose a Periodontist. For your dental implant procedure: Dental implant survival and success rates in dental surgery practices are higher than the same procedures performed by general dentists.

Advanced Education Periodontist receive an additional 3 years of specialized training and education in periodontics and implantology, beyond the standard four years of dental school. Treat Your gums Periodontists are experts at diagnosing and treating diseases of the gum, bone and other tissues surrounding your teeth – helping ensure your overall oral health. Why Firewheel Implant Destination › Patient Health and Safety Is Our #1 Priority.

– Journal of the American Dental Association (JADA) A Surgical Procedure Dental implants are surgically placed, requiring special education, training, and experience to ensure the best results. Implant Specialist Periodontists are, in fact, dental implant experts who perform multiple implant surgeries every day and have placed thousands of implants.

Harvey and I have created what many feel is Dallas’ premier full-arch and full-mouth dental implant destination. Your new smile is made using only the best-in-class materials and restored with a revolutionary digital workflow to ensure ultra-precision and comfort. Watch James’ Life-Changing Story Real Patient of Dr. Gandhi View More Real Patient Stories › One Day. One Office. One Team. Life-Changing Results.

Vikram Gandhi and Dr. Jared Harvey has become the #1 choice for the Full-Arch, All-on-4, and Teeth- in-a-day procedures throughout the Dallas area. Starting at $15,995 for upper or lower arch, it’s no wonder people drive across Texas for their life-changing smiles. Learn If You’re a Candidate › Featured Treatments With comprehensive dental knowledge and state-of-the-art facilities, Dr. Gandhi and the doctors are prepared to solve the most complex dental problems all under one roof – saving you time and money. All our services are provided to you with amenities to help you feel comfortable and relaxed, giving the feel of a true dental spa.

Learn What We’re Doing › Learn about Firewheel about the Dental Implant Center Dallas’ Premier Implant & Periodontist Team Has Placed More Than 5,000 Dental Implants in Our Ultra High-Tech Surgical Center. The practice’s founder, Dr. Vikram Gandhi , is a Texas A&M magna cum laude graduate and Board-Certified Periodontist. He has created the ultimate destination for smile restoration by building a team of dental implant experts, including fellow Texas A&M grad Dr.

Jared Harvey , who work in state-of-the-art facilities to ensure your smile features ideal aesthetics and long-term success. This one-location solution eliminates your need to travel to different offices, meeting with multiple doctors. And due to the efficiencies of our unique digital workflow, your implant costs are lower than other advertised prices. Yet, the quality remains at the highest standards you'd demand for life-long, beautiful results. More About Our Doctors › Dr.

This amazing process uses the latest CAD/CAM technology and specialized 3D imaging software to virtually preplan the procedure then ensure the actual surgery is delivered with impeccable precision, predictability and speed. Our computer-guided process and unique teamwork approach lead by a Periodontist takes the dental implant solution to a higher level of success. After all, what sounds better to you: freehand, like many practices, or computer-guided and computer-precision.

Learn If You’re a Candidate › State-of-the-art Technology Fully-digital, computer-guided implant surgery procedure dramatically improves safety, precision, and predictability. At Firewheel Dental Implants and Periodontics, our team collaborates with a state-of-the-art digital work flow, known as Guided Implant Surgery.

Single Implant Starting at $1,995 The treatment fee includes: Complete Oral Evaluation Cone-Beam CT Scan Extraction If Needed 1 Implant per Tooth Working with a team of experienced experts who can deliver a life-changing smile Fee does not include Abutment and Crown, which is done by a partner dentist, and other treatments, which may be required in some circumstances, such as bone grafts.
